name: Vindaloo- Pork or Lamb Vindaloo - India
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons grainy mustard, pommery Moutarde de Meaux
2 small onions, cut into half rings
2 ½ lbs boned shoulder of pork or lamb, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 ⅓ cup canned coconut milk, well stirred
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mustard, cumin, turmeric, cayenne, salt and vinegar in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Heat oil in a large nonstick frying pan over medium-high heat.
3. Add onion and stir-fry until it is medium brown.
4. Add garlic and stir for 30 seconds.
5. Add spice paste and stir for one minute.
6. Add meat and stir-fry for about three minutes.
7. Pour in coconut milk and add water if cooking in a pressure cooker (2/3 cup) or conventionally (1 cup).
8. Cover and bring to boil using either high heat for pressure cooking or medium-high heat for conventional cooking.
9. Lower heat to simmer for 20 minutes when using a pressure cooker, or 60-70 minutes when cooking conventionally.
